case_title: MENAHEM COHEN VS. MARIA THERESA BANGUG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE RE: OSC/TRO FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED COHEN, MENAHEM
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE - SANDRA BLAIR, ESQ.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED COHEN, MENAHEM AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED BANGUG, MARIA THERESA HEARING SET FOR JUN-04-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 403
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-04-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 403
GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER - CLETS RESTRAINING ORDER
MOTION TO LIFT RESTRAINING ORDER FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED COHEN, MENAHEM AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED BANGUG, MARIA THERESA HEARING SET FOR AUG-20-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 403

PETITIONER IN PRO PER. RESPONDENT IN PRO PER. PARTIES SIGNED STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PRESENT MOTION BEFORE THE COURT IS PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO LIFT THE RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING FILED JUNE 4, 2002. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT DISSOLVED SAID R/O EFFECTIVE TODAY'S DATE. COURT SHALL PREPARE THE ORDER AFTER HEARING AND MAIL ENDORSED COPIES OF SAID ORDER TO THE PARTIES.
RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING (CLETS) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
FINDINGS AND ORDER AFTER HEARING, HEARD ON AUG-20-2002
APPLICATION AND DECLARATION FOR ORDER (DOMESTIC VIOLENCE) FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED COHEN, MENAHEM AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED BANGUG, MARIA THERESA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE- ROGER MEREDITH, ESQ.
